commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The remaining blockers are localized to the new streaming filter semantics and regression tests, so an automated repair can attempt them without a product decision.; Needs attention: The patch is security-sensitive because it guards hidden reasoning from user-visible text, and malformed-stream cases still cross that boundary.; Review finding: [P1] Keep unclosed reasoning hidden after visible text — src/shared... (sha=e044b1925bc986da003ef599957a99278c22abcd)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a stateful reasoning-tag text filter and wires OpenAI-compatible streamed `delta.content` through it in the active transport parser and legacy completions provider, with focused tests.

PR surface: Source +245, Tests +266. Total +511 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows `delta.content` becomes visible text while `reasoning_content` separately becomes thinking, and the PR body includes before/after loopback SSE proof for that MiniMax-shaped stream.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blockers are localized to the new streaming filter semantics and regression tests, so an automated repair can attempt them without a product decision.
